title: Section 14
content: The 1[Commercial Appellate Court and the Commercial Appellate Division] shall endeavour to dispose of appeals filed before it within a period of six months from the date of filing of such appeal.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 28 of 2018, s. 13 for "Commercial Appellate Division" (w.e.f. 3-5-2018).
